prompt: A clean Japanese e-commerce promotional poster for a waterproof rainwear set, square format, bright high-key product ad style. Show 2 adult models walking outdoors on a wet pavement in light rain with a soft blurred background: 1 taller male model wearing a taupe-brown hooded waterproof jacket and black rain pants, and 1 shorter female model wearing a dusty pink hooded waterproof jacket and black rain pants. Both outfits are lightweight rain suits with zip-front jackets, subtle fabric sheen, visible water droplets on the surface, and casual sneakers. Faces are de-emphasized and not the focus. Use a white and pale gray background layout with the models placed center-right and full body visible. On the left side, large bold Japanese headline text in a mix of black and vivid blue reads exactly: "雨でも快適。しっかり防水" with small blue raindrop accents and a small umbrella icon near the text, plus a yellow brushstroke underline accent beneath the second line. Beneath the headline, add a blue ribbon-style banner with white Japanese text: "上下セット / 男女兼用". Below that, place exactly 3 circular blue feature icons in a horizontal row with Japanese labels: 1) water drops icon with text "耐水圧 20,000mm", 2) upward stretch arrows icon with text "ムレにくい", 3) feather icon with text "軽量設計". At the bottom left, display exactly 6 small product color variants as miniature jacket-and-pants set thumbnails arranged in 2 rows of 3. The 6 colorways are: black set, navy set, olive green set, pink set, beige set, and light gray set. In the top right corner, add a gold laurel award badge with red ribbons and Japanese text reading "Yahoo! ショッピング 第1位 RANKING" with smaller text beneath indicating a daily ranking note. Overall style: polished Japanese marketplace listing hero image, realistic apparel photography composited with clean graphic design, commercial catalog quality, waterproof outdoor lifestyle feel, soft overcast lighting, crisp typography, premium but accessible consumer product presentation.
